INFO PAGE
Family Planning Services
Family planning empowers people to choose if and when they have children.
Department of Public Health
Family planning services include:
Emergency Contraception
Pregnancy Tests, Counseling and Referral
Birth Control Counseling & Prescriptions
STI Testing and Treatment
HIV Counseling and Testing
Reproductive Health Exams
Infertility Assessment & Referral
Reproductive Life Planning
Sexual Health Education and Counseling
Preconception Health Screening and Education
Services are free or low-cost. They are also completely confidential.
Family Planning services are available at the following SF Health Network clinics:
Castro-Mission Health Center
Maxine Hall Health Center
Maria X Martinez Health Resource Center
Potrero Hill Health Center
San Francisco City Clinic
*
Silver Avenue Family Health Center
Southeast Family Health Center
Zuckerberg San Francisco General Family Health Center
Zuckerberg San Francisco General Obstetrics, Midwifery and Gynecology Services
Zuckerberg San Francisco General Women's Options Center
*You do not need to be SF Health Network patient to be seen at City Clinic
And at these SF Health Network youth clinics:
Balboa Teen Health Center
Cole Street Youth Clinic
Michael Baxter Larkin Street Youth Clinic
New Generation Health Center
3rd Street Youth Clinic
Family Planning Services at DPH are supported by the Family Planning Program
We provide support and technical help to clinic sites.
Those services include:
Support with Family Pact and Title X programs
Reproductive health trainings for staff and medical providers
Family planning protocols and screening tools
Culturally and linguistically appropriate client education materials
Outreach and community education
For more information, email
FamilyPlanningProgram@sfdph.org
.
